title: The Crew Finds an Impossible Island
description: On pages 9–12, this part follows Unknown person #1, Franky, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the crew finds an impossible island.
scene: The scene focuses on the crew finds an impossible island, with Unknown person #1, Franky, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Franky!! We need a coup de burst!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No... it's too late for that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yeah, they look just the same...!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Laboon!! Wait!! Listen, please!! It's me, brook!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Nami- San, we await your orders!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: There's no need to go anywhere!!

summary: The Crew Finds an Impossible Island. This part moves the Straw Hats from Fish-Man Island into the New World and begins the mystery of Punk Hazard.
